## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 lines.

## Type of change

- [ ] New app entry
- [ ] Update existing entry
- [ ] Documentation/policy update
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the required table format.
- [ ] I included at least one verifiable source.
- [ ] I checked for duplicates.
- [ ] I validated all links I added.
- [ ] I kept wording neutral and factual.

## Evidence

Add source links and a short rationale.
